title: trifolium arvense var. strictior
intro: Trifolium arvense var. strictior, also known as the strict clover, is a variety of clover plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and an anti-inflammatory, which can help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Trifolium arvense var. strictior include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it has also been used in herbal remedies such as tinctures and salves.
